additives.name: Soda Ash (Sodium Carbonate)
additives.note: DIY alk; dissolve + pH-match before dosing (raw soda ash spikes pH)

additives.name: Baking Soda (Sodium Bicarbonate)
additives.note: DIY alk; gentler on pH than soda ash

additives.name: Baked Baking Soda (→ Soda Ash)
additives.note: Bake NaHCO3 at ~300°F to convert to soda ash, then use this weight

additives.name: Magnesium Mix (DIY stock solution)
additives.note: Stock = 720g MgCl2·6H2O + 180g MgSO4·7H2O per gallon RO/DI

additives.name: BRS 2-Part Liquid Soda Ash (Alk)
additives.note: BRS standard soda-ash stock; verify with the BRS calculator per batch

additives.name: ESV B-Ionic Alkalinity (Comp. 1)
additives.note: Never exceed 1 mL/gal/day; dose components 1+ hr apart

additives.name: Red Sea Reef Foundation A (Calcium)
additives.note: Manufacturer: 1 mL raises 25 gal by 2 ppm Ca

additives.name: Red Sea Reef Foundation B (Alkalinity)
additives.note: Manufacturer: 1 mL raises 25 gal by 0.1 dKH

additives.name: Red Sea Reef Foundation C (Magnesium)
additives.note: Manufacturer: 1 mL raises 25 gal by 1 ppm Mg
